failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing two matching items and produced an answer claiming there were no matches.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned count=2 with two available RGB Mechanical Keyboard items priced above 233.90. At step 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, stating that no items match. This directly contradicts the tool output and led to the incorrect final answer. The failure was not resolved later because the Evaluator approved the contradictory answer instead of correcting it.
